name: Ginger Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rub half a tablespoon of butter into an 8-inch round cake pan. Dust the pan with about a quarter teaspoon of flour.
3. In a large bowl, beat the remaining two tablespoons of butter with the sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Whisk in the egg, honey, fresh ginger, lemon zest, and vanilla.
5. Sift together the remaining flour, baking soda, baking powder, coriander, cinnamon, cardamom, and salt.
6. In a small bowl, toss the crystallized ginger with about half a teaspoon of the dry ingredients to coat completely. Set aside.
7. Alternately add the remaining dry ingredients and buttermilk to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
8. Stir in the crystallized ginger.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for about 35 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Transfer the cake to a rack and let cool in the pan for about 10 minutes.
12. Turn out of the pan and let cool. Sift confectioners sugar on top.
